title: PaleCraft
description: A bone-colored, minimalist texture pack that strikes the perfect balance between the familiar charm of vanilla and visually appealing enhancements.
body:
![Banner](https://github.com/Justifull/PaleCraft/blob/main/display/banner.png?raw=true) ## A Minecraft Texturepack PaleCraft is inspired by the bone texture and is a Black & White styled texturepack. Most textures are still vanilla, only the ore blocks and some items are updated. I changed some coreshaders for better block and hitbox outlines. and a custom XP-Number color. ## Reason for Creation The vanilla minecraft textures are great, thats why I kept as many as a I could. But after the years it just felt kinda borring to me and the inventory did not matched my prefrences anymore. So I created PaleCraft. First it started as 'Honied', based on my old Minecraft-Name 'Honey_Bottle'. This Texturepack was very colorful and had a pastel-looking layout. I copied a lot of things from other Packs and used them for my personal one. Some block textures even were from Soartex. After 2 years I decided that pastel colors and random upscaled block textures are just not mine anymore and I created PaleCraft. PaleCraft updates some texts in Minecraft to make the Menu and tools feel better and more clear. It also renewed the whole Inventory in a very simple and transparent way and textured a lot of things in minecraft bone colors. I think this texturepack, with all its core-shaders, GUI imporvements, better font and overall look is just perfect to me. It is the perfect Vanilla+ version of a Texturepack I always wanted and I hope you guys enjoy it too! <3
           

Not every change included, just sneak peaks
